description: As an administrator (username: admin, password: Admin1234!), create and enable a User Tour named "New Student Dashboard Guide" to guide new students on the Dashboard page (URL match: "/my/%"). The tour must include a step targeting the "Timeline" block with the title "Track Your Deadlines" and content "Check here for upcoming assignment due dates.", as well as a step targeting the "Calendar" block with the title "Important Events", content "View your monthly course schedule here.", and the backdrop enabled.
